verdict: Cole Anthony is a steady, average-impact point guard who positively contributes wins, but his efficiency is slightly below his requested value.
strengths: He consistently adds nearly 4 wins and provides a solid playoff probability, showing a reliable, steady impact.
concern: His impact score is average (48th percentile), and his efficiency ratio suggests he's slightly overvalued at his requested $20M.
recommendation: Negotiate his contract closer to his $18.13M fair value to avoid an overpay relative to his current impact.
audio_summary: Cole Anthony is an average-impact point guard reliably adding wins and improving playoff odds. We recommend negotiating his $20M request down to his $18.13M fair value to avoid an overpay given his current efficiency.
